abstract: Integrate SolvaPay payments into any project. Covers TypeScript SDK integration for Next.js, React, Express, and MCP Server implementations (including fetch-first MCP servers on Cloudflare Workers and Supabase Edge) with paywall protection, hosted and embedded checkout, account management components (CurrentPlanCard, LaunchCustomerPortalButton, usePaymentMethod), customer portal, usage tracking, and webhooks. Also includes a self-contained guide for building an MCP app from scratch on Cloudflare Workers (with full inline templates) or integrating SolvaPay into an existing MCP server, with intent-driven tool composition. And provider account onboarding from setup through live launch.
